text.title: tree-testing Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: e-commerce nav tree-test before redesign.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: E-commerce IA proposed; 6 critical tasks; 80 users across 2 arms (A vs B) via Optimal Workshop.

section.title: Resulting artefact
Outcome
section.p: Validator exits 0. Variant B wins on t1 directness (85% vs 62%); IA finalised on B.
